'''Bracha e'Naso''' once ran [[Esau's Ridge]]. After his boss, [[Plothis]], was shot and killed by a customer, he took over Plothis' business. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] he tried to cheat [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] in a business deal, though he lost and allowed Chewbacca to name his price.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
